note: Per-field fill-value guidance (value type, required-ness, choice-group conditionals). Derived offline from schema/mapping/constraints; consistent with the fill engine. Not legal advice — verify against the official form before filing. Currency/time guidance is conservative because the printed '$'/AM-PM are not read here.

plaintiff.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

locationtown.guidance: The court division / town where the case is filed.

defendant.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

otherpartyifany.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

issuesparental_rightsandresponsibilities.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

numberwithout_delay.guidance: Free-form narrative text specific to the situation.

signature_electronic_or_actual.guidance: A person's name (the engine collapses to initials only if it overflows the box).

defendantscurrent_address_1.guidance: A street address; include the street line. City/State/ZIP may belong in their own boxes — check the printed labels.

defendantscurrent_address_2.guidance: A city or town name only (no state or ZIP).
